description: Assertion anti-pattern detection rules for post-verify skill.

patterns.name: tautological_true
patterns.description: Assertion is always true (assert True, assert 1, self-comparison).

patterns.name: tautological_true_js
patterns.description: Assertion is always true in JS test frameworks.

patterns.name: no_assertion
patterns.description: Test function body contains no assertion statement.
patterns.rule: Function name starts with 'test_' but body contains no 'assert' keyword, pytest.raises, or self.assert* call.

patterns.name: no_assertion_js
patterns.description: Test block contains no expect() or assert() call.
patterns.rule: test() or it() block body contains no expect() or assert() call.

patterns.name: mock_only_assertion
patterns.description: All assertions in the test verify mock call counts or arguments, never real output.
patterns.rule: Flag when all assertions in a test function match mock patterns and none match real-value assertions.

patterns.name: mock_only_assertion_js
patterns.description: All assertions verify mock calls, never real output.
patterns.rule: Flag when all assertions reference mock/spy objects.

patterns.name: broad_exception_swallow
patterns.description: Test catches broad exception and suppresses it.

patterns.name: broad_exception_swallow_js
patterns.description: Test catches all errors and suppresses them.

patterns.name: magic_number
patterns.description: Assertion compares against a numeric literal without descriptive variable name.

patterns.name: sleep_in_test
patterns.description: Test uses time.sleep or setTimeout instead of condition-based waiting.
